Selected Work
01 / 04

Layered — 2025 Predicted Jewelry Trends Pitch

Design Internship · Trend Research & Pitch Deck · 2025

Developed a quarterly jewelry trend forecast and pitch deck for Layered, a contemporary jewelry brand. Researched emerging aesthetics across Bezel, Pearls, and Statement categories, translating cultural and market signals into a seasonal visual strategy. Built mood boards to support the pitch, connecting each trend to Layered's product opportunities and demonstrating both research depth and commercial thinking.

Trend ResearchPitch DeckMood BoardsMarketingBrand Strategy
1 / 3
02 / 04

Layered — Jewelry Design & Iteration

Design Internship · 2025

Concepted and sketched original jewelry designs for Layered's seasonal collections, working from trend references to develop multiple iterations per piece. Each design explored variations in stone setting, material, and silhouette — balancing commercial viability with a strong aesthetic point of view.

Product DesignSketchingIterationCollection Planning

03 / 04

NSU Gallery — Exhibition Design & Production

Art & Design Intern · 2025

This work spans exhibition development, including installation, promotional design, outreach, and day-to-day gallery operations. Tasks included designing promotional materials, layout assessment, organization, assisting with installation and deinstallation, and conducting outreach for the exhibition. Through these experiences, I gained a clear understanding of how each individual task comes together to determine the success of an exhibition.

Exhibition DesignSpatial PlanningFlyer DesignInstallation

Content Creation

Canva · 2024

Designed a series of Instagram posts and gift guides for a luxury skincare brand using Canva. Content spanned product launches, seasonal gift guides, skincare routines, and brand storytelling — tailored to the brand's clean, elevated aesthetic and target audience.

About

Thinker.
Maker.
Art Director.

I am a graduate of Nova Southeastern University, where I earned my Bachelor of Fine Arts in Art and Design with minors in Marketing and Art Administration. My coursework spanned Museum Studies, Graphic Design, Arts Administration, and Business Writing.

I have built hands-on experience through a design internship at Layered — where I researched trends, designed jewelry, and supported content and campaign work — and through an art and design internship at NSU Gallery, where I planned and physically installed a senior exhibition.

I care about work that feels intentional, specific, and true to the brand it's serving. Currently based in South Florida and looking for opportunities to grow inside a creative team doing something that matters.
